description_long: This is a sporty, modified coupe car with a striking black, white, and neon green paint job featuring aggressive claw-like graphics along the sides and hood. The car has a low, aerodynamic profile, a large rear spoiler, and custom alloy wheels, suggesting a design focused on speed and performance. The front end features a sleek, sloped hood with dual sets of rounded headlights and a bold green accent on the bumper. The side windows are tinted, and the body kit includes extended side skirts and a rear diffuser for enhanced aerodynamics. The rear view reveals a prominent spoiler, quad tail lights, and a custom bumper with green highlights. The overall appearance is reminiscent of street racing or tuner culture, with visual cues that emphasize power and agility.
description: A modified, sporty coupe with a black, white, and neon green paint scheme, large rear spoiler, and aggressive street racing graphics.
description_view_0: Side view showing the claw-like green and white graphics, tinted windows, and large rear spoiler.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual rounded headlights, sloped hood with green streaks, and green-accented bumper.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar graphics, visible alloy wheels, and aerodynamic body kit.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the large spoiler, quad tail lights, green rear bumper accents, and custom rear diffuser.
attribute_headlight_design: Dual rounded headlights in a cluster arrangement with clear lenses
